metadata.methodology: City-level search across Sioux Falls and Rapid City with homepage/contact extraction plus selective directory/snippet confirmation where site contact detail was thin

candidates.address: 305 S Elmwood Ave, Sioux Falls, SD 57104
candidates.notes: Long-running Sioux Falls custom engraver with strong direct phone signal, awards/gifts capability, and over 30 years of operating history surfaced on-site.

candidates.address: 2137 S. Minnesota Ave., Sioux Falls, SD
candidates.notes: Awards, trophies, plaques, signage, and personalization shop with a clean contact page and stronger business-facing profile than a simple gift seller.
Established Rapid City engraver serving the Black Hills region with broad material coverage including glass, stone, tile, metal, and awards-oriented work.

Commercial signage and engraving business in Sioux Falls with surfaced direct phone, toll-free number, and email. Website signal was thinner than the strongest direct-site records, so quality stays just below the top tier.
Native-owned Rapid City shop with explicit laser engraving, sand carving, and custom apparel capability. Relevant, but the surfaced pass did not return a clean direct contact block.
Small family-run Sioux Falls laser engraving business working on wood, glass, stone, and leather. Relevant state-level fit, but direct contact detail surfaced weakly in this pass.
